Hero.title: Preserving Eastern Congo Languages Through AI
Hero.description: KivuLingua is building open speech and language datasets for underrepresented Bantu languages to enable inclusive AI, linguistic preservation, and community-driven research across Eastern Congo.

community.description: Native Mashi speakers and contributors already involved in community validation and linguistic preservation.

languages.description: Underrepresented Bantu languages from Eastern Congo targeted for preservation and AI research.

audio.description: High-quality aligned speech recordings planned for ASR and TTS dataset construction.

open.description: Community-owned datasets and benchmarks designed for open African language AI research.
